content.speakerText: How do I know it went through? Will I get an email?
content.speakerTextCn: 怎么确认报名成功？会收到邮件吗？

options.text: You’ll get a confirmation email within 24 hours.
You’ll receive a text message in 3 days.
Just wait for a phone call from the office.
You don’t need any confirmation — it’s automatic.

content.explanation: 正确答案是 'You’ll get a confirmation email within 24 hours.'，因为对话中明确提到邮件是主要确认方式。其他选项错误：短信三天后送达不符合时间要求，电话通知未被提及，而'无需确认'与主动确认反馈的场景目标相悖。

content.speakerText: Can I print a receipt? I need it for my visa records.
content.speakerTextCn: 能打印收据吗？我需要用于签证材料。

options.text: Sure! Go to ‘My Exams’ and click ‘Print Receipt’.
Sorry, we don’t issue receipts for visa purposes.
You can ask the front desk for a printed copy.
Receipts are only available after the exam date.

content.explanation: 正确答案是 'Sure! Go to ‘My Exams’ and click ‘Print Receipt’.'，与对话中提供的具体操作一致。其他选项错误：拒绝提供收据违背用户需求，前台打印未被提及，且收据应在报名后立即可用，而非考试后。

content.speakerText: I just registered for the TOEFL. How can I make sure everything is recorded correctly?
content.speakerTextCn: 我刚报名了托福考试，如何确保所有信息都正确记录？

options.text: Check your email and portal for confirmation and status.
Call the test center tomorrow to verify your details.
Wait for a letter to arrive in the mail.
Ask a friend who took the test last year.

content.explanation: 正确答案强调通过邮件和门户双重确认，符合场景核心策略。其他选项不可靠：电话验证非标准流程，纸质信件已过时，而向他人询问不能替代官��系统确认。

content.template: You’ll get a confirmation ___ within 24 hours.
content.hint: 这是确认报名成功的官方通知方式

content.template: Go to ‘My Exams’ and click ___ Receipt.
content.hint: 这是获取纸质收据的直接操作指令
content.knowledgePoint: 场景核心动词搭配：print a receipt

content.template: Please ___ the confirmation email and portal screenshot — they’re needed for your visa application.
content.hint: 为了避免后续纠纷，建议保留所有凭证
content.knowledgePoint: 场景功能表达：保存凭证（save both）

content.speakerText: How do I know it went through? Will I get an email?
content.speakerTextCn: 怎么确认报名成功？会收到邮件吗？
expectedAnswers: I’ll check my email and the portal — both should show ‘Registered’.
Yes, I expect a confirmation email within 24 hours, and I’ll make sure to save it.
Could you please confirm that both the email and online portal will be updated? I need to keep proof for my records.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确提及邮件和门户两种确认方式
语言准确性：语法正确，无明显错误
表达自然度：使用口语化表达如 'I’ll check' 或 'I expect'，而非机械背诵

content.speakerText: Can I print a receipt? I need it for my visa records.
content.speakerTextCn: 能打印收据吗？我需要用于签证材料。
expectedAnswers: Yes, you can print it from ‘My Exams’ — just click ‘Print Receipt’ and save the PDF.
Of course! The PDF link is available right now, but don’t forget — it expires in 7 days.
Absolutely. I’ll print it immediately and keep both the PDF and a hard copy for my visa.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确提供操作步骤（如点击位置）和时间限制
语言准确性：正确使用 'print', 'PDF', 'expires' 等关键词
表达自然度：使用口语连接词如 'just', 'don’t forget', 'absolutely'
关键词覆盖：包含 'print receipt', 'PDF', 'expires in 7 days', 'visa records'

content.speakerText: I just completed my registration. What should I do next to make sure everything is official?
content.speakerTextCn: 我刚完成注册，接下来该做什么才能确保一切正式生效？
expectedAnswers: I’ll check my email for the confirmation and log into the portal to verify my status is ‘Registered’.
I’ll download and save the receipt and screenshot the confirmation page — just in case.
I need to confirm both the email and the portal update, and I’ll print the receipt before the link expires.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否覆盖确认、保存、打印等关键动作
语言准确性：使用完成时、将来时正确，无结构错误
表达自然度：使用 'just in case', 'before the link expires' 等地道表达
